Home / Services / Fence Cleaning

Fence Cleaning

Protect and beautify your fence with our professional fence cleaning service.

Fences are exposed to the elements year-round, and they can quickly become dirty and stained. Algae, mildew, and dirt can accumulate on the surface, making your fence look unsightly. Our fence cleaning service removes these contaminants, restoring your fence to its original beauty. We use specialized cleaning solutions and low-pressure washing techniques to protect your fence from damage. We understand the unique challenges of cleaning wood, vinyl, and metal fences, and we tailor our approach accordingly. We also pay close attention to detail, ensuring that all sides of your fence are thoroughly cleaned. A clean fence not only enhances your property's curb appeal but also helps to extend its lifespan.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Inspection of your fence to assess the type of material and the extent of the cleaning needed.
  2. 02 Step 2: Application of a specialized cleaning solution to loosen dirt and grime.
  3. 03 Step 3: Gentle power washing with low pressure to remove contaminants.
  4. 04 Step 4: Optional staining or sealing to protect your fence from future damage.

Benefits

  • Removes algae, mildew, and dirt
  • Restores your fence's appearance
  • Extends the life of your fence
  • Increases your home's curb appeal

Frequently Asked Questions

Will fence cleaning damage my wood fence?

No, we use low pressure and specialized cleaning solutions that are safe for all types of wood.

How long does fence cleaning take?

The duration depends on the size and condition of your fence, but it typically takes 1-3 hours.

Do you offer fence staining or sealing?

Yes, we offer fence staining and sealing services to protect your fence from the elements.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with fence cleaning? Contact us today.
